summary:
The transformation properties are influenced primarily by temperature fluctuations altering molecular dynamics within the system. This change triggers transitions between liquid-like solutions and solid gels reversibly. \boxed{Temperature}

The summary captures the essence of how temperature impacts transformations without extraneous details while addressing both aspects required for clarity regarding state changes in reversible hydrogels/sol-gel systems under varying temperatures.
